# CuppingNotes - Professional Coffee Cupping Platform

> CuppingNotes is a modern, SCA-standard coffee evaluation platform for specialty coffee professionals, roasters, and cuppers worldwide.

## What is CuppingNotes?

CuppingNotes is a web application that enables professional coffee cupping with SCA (Specialty Coffee Association) standards. It provides precision sensory logging, scoring, and sharing capabilities for specialty coffee professionals.

## Core Features

- **SCA-Standard Cupping Forms**: Score coffee using the official SCA cupping protocol with attributes including Fragrance/Aroma, Flavor, Aftertaste, Acidity, Body, Balance, Uniformity, Clean Cup, Sweetness, and Overall
- **Sensory Radar Charts**: Visual representation of coffee quality profiles using interactive radar charts
- **Community Board**: Share and discover cupping results from verified roasteries and professional cuppers worldwide
- **Analytics Dashboard**: Track cupping history, identify trends, and analyze sensory preferences over time
- **OCR Bean Recognition**: Use Tesseract.js-powered OCR to scan coffee bean labels for quick data entry
- **Team/Roastery Management**: Create and manage roastery teams with verified badge status
- **Gamification**: XP-based leveling system that rewards consistent cupping activity
- **Multi-language Support**: Available in English, Indonesian (Bahasa), and Spanish
- **PWA (Progressive Web App)**: Install on mobile devices for offline-capable, native-like experience

## Scoring System

CuppingNotes uses the SCA 100-point scoring system:
- **90+**: Outstanding — Specialty coffee of exceptional quality
- **85-89.99**: Excellent — Specialty coffee with distinctive character
- **80-84.99**: Very Good — Meets specialty grade threshold
- **Below 80**: Commercial grade — Below specialty standards

## Technology

- Built with Angular 21 and Firebase
- Real-time data synchronization via Cloud Firestore
- Offline-first architecture for use in remote farming/roastery locations
- Responsive mobile-first design optimized for field use

## Target Users

- Specialty coffee roasters
- Professional Q-Graders and cuppers
- Coffee importers and exporters
- Roastery quality control teams
- Coffee enthusiasts pursuing specialty knowledge

## URL

https://cuppingnotes.online

## Contact

For inquiries, visit https://cuppingnotes.online/contact
